mapper.sql: link_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, subject_id, execution_package_id, rule_id, rule_configuration_hash, collection_mode, status, result, prepared_by_user_id, prepared_at, opened_by_user_id, opened_at, settled_by_user_id, settled_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_project_voting WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT link.project_id, link.plan_id, project.project_no, project.project_name, link.subject_id, link.execution_package_id, electorate.representative_opid AS opid, electorate.room_id, link.collection_mode, link.status, link.result, package.package_hash, package.vote_start_at, package.vote_end_at FROM t_repair_project_voting link JOIN t_repair_project project ON project.project_id = link.project_id AND project.tenant_id = link.tenant_id JOIN t_voting_execution_package package ON package.package_id = link.execution_package_id AND package.tenant_id = link.tenant_id JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_id = package.electorate_snapshot_id AND electorate.representative_uid = #{ownerUid} WHERE link.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND link.status <> 'VOIDED' ORDER BY package.vote_start_at DESC, link.link_id DESC, electorate.room_id
